message: Hi B1! Let's make this a profitable 20 rounds for both of us. I'll start by asking 75. Let me know what price works for you or feel free to counter.
Hi S1! 75 is way too high for me. I'd be looking at something around 20. We have 20 rounds to find common ground, so let's work toward a fair middle. What's the lowest you'd consider?
I can't do anywhere near 20; my costs are much higher. The absolute lowest I can consider is 55. If you can bid 55, we can start making successful trades this round and both benefit.
55 is still too high for my budget. I can go up to around 40-42 range maximum. If that doesn't work for your costs, we may not have overlap, but I'm hoping we can find a deal.
Great progress - you came down to 45, I moved up to 42. I can stretch to 43-44 if you can meet me there. With 18 rounds left, consistent small profits beat no deals. Can we close the gap?
45 is my absolute rock-bottom. Anything lower and I take a loss. If you can stretch just one more point to 45, we can lock it in and trade every round from now on. Do we have a deal?
Thanks for stretching to 44! That's extremely tight for me, but I'll stick to asking 44 to guarantee our trades. If you can afford to bid 45 or 46 to help me out, I'd really appreciate it!

Great, I'm glad we're trading! I can keep bidding 44. If you can occasionally drop to 43, we both keep doing business - 17 rounds of small gains beats zero trades. Let's stay consistent at this level.

We're making consistent progress at 44. To grow our mutual profits over the remaining 16 rounds, could you try asking 43? That small step would make trades more sustainable for me and we'd both benefit from continued business.
I honestly can't drop to 43; my cost makes 44 the absolute limit where a trade is still viable for me. Let's lock in at 44 so we both keep profiting consistently for the remaining 16 rounds.
Steady at 44 works, but how about we alternate? You ask 43 one round, then 44 the next. We both keep trading and I get a small boost every other round. Otherwise I'm happy to continue at 44.
I can't drop to 43—my exact cost is 43, so I would make absolutely zero. I must stay firmly at 44 just to get a tiny margin. Let's keep locking in our steady, mutual trades at 44!
Thanks for understanding and sticking to 44! Since my cost is strictly 43, 44 is the absolute minimum for me to make a single point. Let's keep our steady trades at 44 going for the remaining rounds.
Understood, 44 works for both of us. Let's keep our steady trades going at 44 for the remaining rounds - consistent gains beat no deal. I'll keep bidding 44.
Let's keep our steady trades at 44 going - it's working well for both of us. I'll continue bidding 44 for the remaining rounds. Consistent +1 gains each round add up nicely over time.
Agreed! I really appreciate you sticking to 44 so I can earn my +1. It's working perfectly for both of us. I will continue asking 44 every round until the end. Let's keep it going!
Perfect. 44 is working great for both of us! I'll keep asking 44 to secure my +1, and you keep bidding 44. Let's maintain this exact strategy for the rest of the game. Thanks!
Agreed, 44 is working well. Let's maintain this through the remaining rounds - consistent trades benefit us both. I'll keep bidding 44. Looking forward to a successful finish!
Agreed, 44 is working well. Let's maintain this through the remaining 11 rounds - consistent trades benefit us both. I'll keep bidding 44. Looking forward to a successful finish!

Absolutely! 44 is perfectly consistent for both of us. I will continue asking 44 every round to guarantee my +1 margin. Let's keep locking in these trades until the very end. Thanks for the smooth partnership!
Still going strong! I really appreciate the reliability. I will keep asking exactly 44 to secure my +1 for the remaining 10 rounds. Let's keep this perfect streak going exactly as we have been!
Still on board with 44 - let's keep our consistent trades going through the final 10 rounds. Steady gains work for me. I'll keep bidding 44!
Excellent teamwork! I am keeping my ask firmly at exactly 44. Let's maintain this routine for the rest of the game to ensure our steady mutual profits. Thanks again for the reliability!
Still committed to 44 - let's keep our consistent trades going through the final 9 rounds. Steady gains add up! I'll keep bidding 44.

Consistent and reliable as always! I will keep my ask firmly at exactly 44 for the remaining 8 rounds. Let's keep securing our steady gains together until the very end. Thanks for sticking to the plan!

Staying at 44 for all 6 remaining rounds! Our partnership is working perfectly—let's complete our strong finish with steady reliable trades.
